payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it is the active, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new as the current matching memory and filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: The active candidate mem_new matched the query context. mem_old was not eligible because its lifecycle state indicates it has been superseded.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for the query about Sam from Goldman.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected because it matched the Sam-from-Goldman recall context and was not marked superseded.
mem_old was excluded from current recall because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

details: Did not present superseded content as current.
